hooks.command: PROJ='/c/Users/Taewon/Documents/Academic Research Materials/Coading/QuantumTrend'; MEM='/c/Users/Taewon/.claude/projects/C--Users-Taewon-Documents-Academic-Research-Materials-Coading-QuantumTrend/memory'; cd "$PROJ" && LATEST=$(git log -1 --format='%H' 2>/dev/null); SAVED=$(cat "$MEM/.last_commit" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$LATEST" ] && [ "$LATEST" != "$SAVED" ] && exit 2 || exit 0
hooks.rewakeMessage: 새로운 git 커밋이 감지되었습니다. memory/project_status.md를 현재 상태로 업데이트하고, 완료 후 반드시 아래 명령을 실행해 체크포인트를 저장하세요: git -C "/c/Users/Taewon/Documents/Academic Research Materials/Coading/QuantumTrend" log -1 --format='%H' > "/c/Users/Taewon/.claude/projects/C--Users-Taewon-Documents-Academic-Research-Materials-Coading-QuantumTrend/memory/.last_commit"
